changes: Preserved the Hunyuan-generated face, body silhouette, hair, outfit texture, and overall visual likeness.
Removed the oversized helper Icosphere from the exported asset so runtime bounds come from the character mesh.
Smoothed body mesh polygons and added weighted normals in the Blender source.
Tuned material roughness/specular response without replacing the original texture.
limitations: Still a single Hunyuan mesh, so face, hair, outfit, hands, and shoes are not separately editable.
Skin weights remain auto-generated preview weights.
This is a visual-preserving runtime preview, not the final commercial-grade retopologized character.
